name: bean
description: Local hybrid search over your knowledge base — 12 core connectors (Slack, Google Drive, Notion, GitHub, Confluence, Jira, Zendesk, Salesforce, HubSpot, Microsoft 365, Discord, local files incl. PDF), ~45 more as enable-on-demand prototypes, and a plugin system + skill for authoring your own. /bean <question>, /bean sync, /bean init. No server: your credentials, Lance + DuckDB under ~/.bean.
